welcome: Hello! I'm the Beleqet FAQ Assistant. Ask me about jobs, freelance work, escrow, wallet withdrawals, or your account.
consentBody: We store your chat messages for up to 90 days to improve support. You can export or delete your data anytime.

errors.consentRequired: GDPR consent is required before using the FAQ Bot
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please start a new chat.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
